creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've made a NEW port with respect to dump utility xd.

        I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

        Packed tarball is

                975 Oct 17 19:15 xd-2.3.tar.gz

        Packed list is

                  0 Oct 17 19:14 1997 xd/                 
                375 Oct 17 19:11 1997 xd/Makefile         
                  0 Oct  1 20:18 1997 xd/files/           
                 56 Oct  1 20:18 1997 xd/files/md5        
                  0 Oct  1 20:25 1997 xd/patches/         
                323 Oct  1 20:25 1997 xd/patches/patch-aa 
                  0 Oct 17 19:09 1997 xd/pkg/             
                 32 Oct 17 19:09 1997 xd/pkg/COMMENT      
                209 Oct 17 19:08 1997 xd/pkg/DESCR        
                 24 Oct 16 22:25 1997 xd/pkg/PLIST
